zh.lifeSummary: 當John Borland III於1792年4月12日出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親John Borland II52歲，母親Margaret Carnes28歲。他於1832年12月4日與Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭薩萊姆 堂史普結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1850年住在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭富蘭克林。他去世於1865年9月9日在美國賓夕法尼亞州威斯特摩蘭薩萊姆 堂史普享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Borland III于1792年4月12日出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲John Borland II52岁，母亲Margaret Carnes28岁。他于1832年12月4日与Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭薩萊姆 堂史普结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1850年住在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭富蘭克林。他去世于1865年9月9日在美国宾夕法尼亚州威斯特摩蘭薩萊姆 堂史普享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Borland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Bor(e)land or Bordland in Dumfriesshire, Galloway, Fife, and Perthshire, which are named with Old or Middle English bord ‘board, table’ + land ‘land’, i.e. land that supplied the lord's table, in other words ‘home farm’.

variants.name: Burland
meanings: English: topographic name from either Middle English burlond ‘peasant land’ (Old English gebūrland) or Middle English burgh + lond ‘land belonging to a town or borough’ (Old English burg + land). The surname could also be a habitational name from any of the places in Cheshire and the East Yorkshire named Burland, or Bowerland in Devon, Surrey, and Kent. The Yorkshire name is derived from Old English bȳre ‘byre, cow shed’ + land, the rest from Old English (ge)būr ‘peasant’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

historicEvents.title: The Black Hawk War
historicEvents.description: Convinced that a group of Native American tribes were hostile, The United States formed a frontier militia to stop them in their tracks. Even though Black Hawk was hoping to avoid bloodshed while trying to resettle on tribal land, U.S. officials opened fire on the Native Americans. Black Hawk then responded to this confrontation by successfully attacking the militia at the Battle of Stillman's Run and then left northward. After a few months the militia caught up with Black Hawk and his men and defeated them at the Battle of Wisconsin Heights. While being weakened by hunger, injuries and desertion, Black Hawk and the rest of the many native survivors retreated towards the Mississippi. Unfortunately, Black Hawk and other leaders were later captured when they surrendered to the US forces and were then imprisoned for a year.
The Night of the BIG WIND. In Killarney and its neighborhood there was a terrible hurricane. The town sustained much damage and many houses were shattered.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The three day Battle of Gettysburg was one of the bloodiest of the American Civil War. Between the Confederates and Unions, somewhere between 46,000 and 51,000 people died that day.

en.lifeSummary: When John Borland III was born on 12 April 1792, in Ireland, his father, John Borland II, was 52 and his mother, Margaret Carnes, was 28. He married Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody on 4 December 1832, in Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in Franklin, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States in 1850. He died on 9 September 1865, in Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Borland III est né le 12 avril 1792, à Irlande, son père, John Borland II, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Margaret Carnes, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody le 4 décembre 1832, à Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il a vécu à Franklin, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis en 1850. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1865, à Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Borland III am 12. April 1792 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Borland II 52 und seine Mutter Margaret Carnes 28. Er hat am 4. Dezember 1832 in Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1850 hat er in Franklin, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 9. September 1865 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Borland III è nato il il 12 aprile 1792 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, John Borland II, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Carnes, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody il 4 dicembre 1832, nel Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a Franklin, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850. Morì il 9 settembre 1865, nel Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Borland IIIが1792年4月12日にアイルランドで生まれた時，父John Borland IIは52歳，母Margaret Carnesは28歳であった。1832年12月4日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドサレム トウンシュイップでMary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoodyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドフランクリンに住んでいた。彼は1865年9月9日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ウエストモーエランドサレム トウンシュイップで73歳で死去した。

ko.Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvan: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 살렘 타운시프
ko.Penn Township, Westmoreland, Pennsylvani: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 펜 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: John Borland III(이)가 1792년 4월 12일 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Borland II(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Carnes(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1832년 12월 4일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 살렘 타운시프에서 Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 프랭클린에서 살았다. 그는 1865년 9월 9일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 웨스트모렐랜드 살렘 타운시프에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Borland III nasceu em 12 de abril de 1792, em Irlanda, seu pai, John Borland II, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Carnes, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody em 4 de dezembro de 1832, em Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em Franklin, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1865, em Salem Township, Westmoreland, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Borland III родился 12 апреля 1792 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени John Borland II было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Carnes, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Elizabeth "Eliza" Dunwoody 4 декабря 1832 г. в местности сеилем тоуншип, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности фрэнклинь, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Он умер 9 сентября 1865 г. в местности сеилем тоуншип, вестмореланд, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 73 лет.
